with-pdf.description: ArmourTraits dataset is a comparative resource analyzing ecological and evolutionary correlates of dermal armor in squamates (lizards and snakes). It includes morphological data from 131 species across two lineages (Cordyliformes and Anguimorpha), integrating osteoderm measurements, hindlimb skeletal traits, ecological variables, predation risk estimates, and a time-calibrated phylogeny.
with-pdf.keywords: Ecological and evolutionary analysis of defensive traits in reptiles, Phylogenetic comparative studies, Morphological adaptation in squamates

no-metadata.description: Predation risk analysis for Birds, Mammals, Snakes, and Armour Traits data

base-metadata.description: Predation risk analysis for mammals, birds, and snakes; armour traits with outgroups
base-metadata.keywords: Ecology, Biology, Animal Behavior, Evolutionary Traits

with-pdf.description: Ecological and evolutionary analysis of dermal armor (osteoderms) in squamates (lizards/snakes), integrating morphological, ecological, and phylogenetic data from 131 species across two lineages (Cordyliformes and Anguimorpha) to study defensive traits, locomotor adaptations, predator-prey dynamics, and evolutionary trade-offs
with-pdf.keywords: Ecological Evolution, Phylogenetic Analysis, Defensive Traits in Reptiles, Comparative Morphology, Predator-Prey Dynamics

no-metadata.description: Predation risk analysis across mammals, birds, and snakes; armour traits with outgroups

with-pdf.description: Standardized quantitative metrics of defensive morphology (e.g., osteoderm expression, hindlimb skeletal traits) for 131 squamate species (Cordyliformes and Anguimorpha). Integrates morphological data from micro-CT scans, ecological/life-history variables, environmental factors, predation risk estimates, and a time-calibrated phylogeny.
with-pdf.keywords: Comparative anatomy, evolutionary biology, ecology, phylogenetics, morphometrics, conservation science

no-metadata.description: Predation risk analysis across mammals, birds, snakes, and armour traits phylogenetic data

with-pdf.description: Comparative ecological and evolutionary data on dermal armor (osteoderms) in squamates (lizards and snakes), focusing on convergent evolution across two lineages: Cordyliformes and Anguimorpha. Integrates morphological, ecological, and phylogenetic data to analyze defensive traits, locomotion, predation risk, and evolutionary trade-offs.
with-pdf.keywords: ecological evolution, comparative morphology, evolutionary biology, phylogenetics, predator-prey dynamics

with-pdf.description: 4-month collection of interactive SSH honeypot logs and command payloads (July–November 2025) designed for cybersecurity research, particularly in botnet behavior analysis, intrusion detection, and machine learning model training. Includes detailed telemetry such as source IPs, credentials, and command-line payloads with rare instances of file-less exploitation via bash sockets.
with-pdf.keywords: Cybersecurity research; Botnet analysis; Intrusion detection; Machine learning; Threat intelligence

with-pdf.description: ANEST Narrative–Affect Dataset (ANAD v1): A large-scale derived feature resource quantifying narrative-affective discrepancy, containing 351,734 English-language personal narratives from public online discussions about romantic and relational life. Includes structural descriptors, narrative complexity index (LoC), and affective polarity scores via VADER.
with-pdf.keywords: computational narrative psychology, affective computing, emotion AI research, text analysis, psychological measurement

no-metadata.description: dataset description

with-pdf.keywords: Computational psychology, affective computing, narrative analysis

no-metadata.description: dataset description

with-pdf.description: ANEST Narrative–Affect Dataset (ANAD v1): 351,734 English-language personal narratives from public online discussions (e.g., Reddit) focused on romantic and relational life, structured into three layers of annotations (basic structural descriptors, Level of Complexity; LoC index, normalized affective polarity score) with a Narrative–Affect Discrepancy Index (NADI) metric quantifying discrepancy between narrative complexity and affect on a 0–10 scale
with-pdf.keywords: Affective Computing, Narrative Analysis, Computational Psychology, Text Mining, Social Media Research
